source: DESI Year-1 BAO (DESI Collaboration 2024) — preliminary near-term constraint pending DESI Y3 (2027)
notes: DESI Y1 BAO measurement of the sound horizon at the drag epoch r_d (or equivalently r_s) consistent with Planck 2018 ΛCDM at the sub-percent level. Used here as an interim constraint pending the v12-target DESI Y3 release. The Y3 increment will sharpen the bound by a factor of ~2.
